refnamediv.refpurpose: Set the SRID on a geometry.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Sets the SRID on a geometry to a particular integer value. Useful in constructing bounding boxes for queries.

note.para: This function does not transform the geometry coordinates in any way - it simply sets the meta data defining the spatial reference system the geometry is assumed to be in. Use if you want to transform the geometry into a new projection.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: -- Mark a point as WGS 84 long lat --
-- Mark a point as WGS 84 long lat and then transform to web mercator (Spherical Mercator) --
